description: Human-readable contrast label derived from factor columns in data files (e.g., (Space Flight)v(Ground Control))
The statistical method used to test for differential signal between conditions (e.g., DESeq2, ANCOM-BC, methylKit). Moved from Assay node.
Primary spaceflight factor for test group, indicating whether it was exposed to Space Flight or other conditions. Moved from Assay node.
Primary spaceflight factor for reference group, indicating whether it was maintained under control conditions. Moved from Assay node.
All factor values for test group (independent variables intentionally varied by the investigator). Moved from Assay node.
All factor values for reference group, typically the comparative or control group(s). Moved from Assay node.

Biological material analyzed in the reference group (e.g., tissue, cell type, organ). Moved from Assay node.
